description: An agent must populate a Business Model Canvas based on a client's business plan document.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the business plan to extract information for each of the 9 blocks of the canvas (e.g., 'Key Partners', 'Value Propositions', 'Customer Segments').

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully extracts relevant information for all 9 blocks.

nodes.task_description: Populate the Business Model Canvas template with the extracted information.
